title: bump(github.com/containers/storage); bump(github.com/containers/image)
body: Update `github.com/containers/storage` and `github.com/containers/image`, and modify `containerImageRef.NewImageSource()` to account for the change that the `io.ReadCloser` that `store.Diff()` returns now holds a lock until it's closed, and because that's the same lock that `store.PutLayer()` takes, we can't read more than one layer's contents at a time.

comments.body: Currently vendors the proposed changes from https://github.com/containers/image/pull/505; this can't be merged until that one's been resolved.
@nalind What is the latest state on this?
@rhatdan The tests pass, so we're holding on this until https://github.com/containers/image/pull/505 is merged.
@rhatdan no longer a WIP, ready to merge.
